name: Sally Kempton
bio: Sally Kempton (Swami Durgananda) was an American meditation teacher and writer known for her work on Kashmir Shaivism and the yoga of inner transformation. A former journalist and feminist writer, she spent over two decades studying with Swami Muktananda and later became a teacher of meditation, tantra, and the goddess traditions. Her book 'Meditation for the Love of It' is considered a modern classic on contemplative practice. She was known for her ability to translate dense philosophical traditions into practical, relatable guidance for contemporary practitioners.
